disclaimer: These rates are estimates based on publicly available government data. For official rates and eligibility, visit Services Australia.

categories.label: Single, 22 or older, no children
categories.description: Base JobSeeker Payment for single person aged 22 to Age Pension age with no dependent children. Includes Energy Supplement.

categories.label: Single, principal carer with children
categories.description: JobSeeker Payment for single principal carers with dependent children. Includes Energy Supplement.

categories.label: Single, 55 or older, on payment 9+ continuous months
categories.description: Higher rate for single recipients aged 55+ who have been on payment for 9 or more continuous months. Includes Energy Supplement.

categories.label: Partnered (each)
categories.description: JobSeeker Payment rate for each member of a couple. Includes Energy Supplement.

incomeTest.description: Personal income test for JobSeeker Payment. Income above the free area reduces the payment in two taper bands.

taperBands.description: 50 cents per dollar between $150 and $256 per fortnight
60 cents per dollar above $256 per fortnight

partnerIncomeTest.description: If your partner earns above the partner income free area, your payment reduces by the taper rate for each dollar over the threshold.

assetTest.description: Asset test for allowance payments including JobSeeker. This is a hard cut-off — if assets exceed the threshold, payment is zero. The principal home is excluded.
excludes: Principal home (the home you live in)

references.title: How much JobSeeker Payment you can get
references.notes: Official page listing maximum payment rates by situation. Rates include Energy Supplement.

references.title: Indexation Rates - 20 March 2026
references.notes: Official indexed rates publication for the March 2026 indexation period.

references.title: Income test for JobSeeker Payment
references.notes: Official income test rules including personal and partner income tests, taper rates, and income free areas.

references.title: Income and assets tests for JobSeeker Payment
references.notes: Official asset test thresholds. JobSeeker uses a hard cut-off (no taper) for assets.
